---
title: "Regresi_Linear_Nonlinear"
author: "5052241006_Nabila Chesaria Octavia Putri"
date: "2026-04-19"
output: html_document
---
Model Regresi


Penaksir Parameter
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Data input
x <- c(5, 2, 12, 9, 15, 6, 25, 16)
y <- c(64, 87, 50, 71, 44, 56, 42, 60)

# Jumlah observasi
n <- length(y)

# Hitung rata-rata manual (tanpa mean())
xbar <- sum(x) / n
ybar <- sum(y) / n

# Inisialisasi akumulator
suma <- 0  # untuk numerator b1
sumb <- 0  # untuk denominator b1

# Hitung sum(xi - xbar)(yi - ybar) dan sum(xi - xbar)^2
for (i in 1:n) {
  suma <- suma + (x[i] - xbar) * (y[i] - ybar)  # kovarian X dan Y
  sumb <- sumb + (x[i] - xbar)^2                 # variansi X
}

# Estimasi koefisien
b1 <- suma / sumb        # slope
b0 <- ybar - b1 * xbar  # intercept

# Tampilkan hasil
cat("b0 (intercept):", b0, "\n")
cat("b1 (slope)    :", b1, "\n")
cat("Model: Y_hat =", b0, "+", b1, "* X\n")
```

Prediksi dan Residual
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Inisialisasi vektor
ytopi <- numeric(n)  # nilai prediksi
resid  <- numeric(n) # residual

for (i in 1:n) {
  ytopi[i] <- b0 + b1 * x[i]        # prediksi Y ke-i
  resid[i]  <- y[i] - ytopi[i]      # residual ke-i
}

# Tampilkan tabel prediksi
hasil <- data.frame(
  X       = x,
  Y_aktual = y,
  Y_prediksi = round(ytopi, 4),
  Residual   = round(resid, 4)
)
print(hasil)
```

Dekomposisi Sum of Squares
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
ssr <- 0  # sum of squares regression
sse <- 0  # sum of squares error

for (i in 1:n) {
  ssr <- ssr + (ytopi[i] - ybar)^2  # deviasi prediksi dari rata-rata Y
  sse <- sse + (y[i] - ytopi[i])^2  # deviasi aktual dari prediksi
}

sst <- ssr + sse  # total sum of squares

# Degrees of freedom
dfr <- 1      # regresi: jumlah prediktor
dfe <- n - 2  # error: n dikurangi jumlah parameter (b0 dan b1)
dft <- n - 1  # total

# Mean squares
msr <- ssr / dfr  # mean square regression
mse <- sse / dfe  # mean square error

cat("SSR:", ssr, "\nSSE:", sse, "\nSST:", sst, "\n")
cat("MSR:", msr, "\nMSE:", mse, "\n")
```

Koefisien Determinasi R2
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rsq  <- ssr / sst                             # R-squared
radj <- rsq - (dfr * (1 - rsq)) / (n - dfr - 1)  # R-squared adjusted

cat("R-squared         :", round(rsq, 4), "\n")
cat("R-squared Adjusted:", round(radj, 4), "\n")
```

Uji Serentak
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
alpha <- 0.05  # tingkat signifikansi

# Hitung F hitung
fhit <- msr / mse

# F tabel dari distribusi F
ftab <- qf(1 - alpha, dfr, dfe)

# Hitung p-value
pvalf <- round(1 - pf(fhit, dfr, dfe), 4)

# Keputusan
if (fhit > ftab) {
  tandaf <- ">"
  kep    <- "Tolak H0"
} else {
  tandaf <- "<"
  kep    <- "Gagal Tolak H0"
}

# Tabel ANOVA
source_col <- c("Regression", "Residual", "Total")
df_col     <- c(dfr, dfe, dft)
ss_col     <- c(ssr, sse, sst)
ms_col     <- c(msr, mse, NA)
fh_col     <- c(fhit, NA, NA)
ft_col     <- c(ftab, NA, NA)
pv_col     <- c(pvalf, NA, NA)

tabel_anova <- data.frame(
  Source    = source_col,
  df        = df_col,
  SS        = round(ss_col, 4),
  MS        = round(ms_col, 4),
  F_hitung  = round(fh_col, 4),
  F_tabel   = round(ft_col, 4),
  p_value   = pv_col
)

print(tabel_anova)
cat("\nKesimpulan: F hitung", tandaf, "F tabel →", kep, "\n")
```

Uji Parsial
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Hitung sum xi^2 dan sum (xi - xbar)^2 secara manual
sumb0 <- 0  # untuk s(b0): sum xi^2
sumb1 <- 0  # untuk s(b1): sum (xi - xbar)^2

for (i in 1:n) {
  sumb0 <- sumb0 + x[i]^2               # jumlah kuadrat xi
  sumb1 <- sumb1 + (x[i] - xbar)^2     # jumlah kuadrat deviasi xi
}

# Standard error koefisien
seb0 <- sqrt(mse * sumb0 / (n * sumb1))  # standard error b0
seb1 <- sqrt(mse / sumb1)                # standard error b1

# t hitung
thit0 <- b0 / seb0  # t hitung untuk intercept
thit1 <- b1 / seb1  # t hitung untuk koefisien

# t tabel (dua arah)
ttab <- qt(1 - alpha / 2, dfe)

# Hitung p-value (dua arah)
pval0 <- if (thit0 < 0) 2 * pt(thit0, dfe) else 2 * (1 - pt(thit0, dfe))
pval1 <- if (thit1 < 0) 2 * pt(thit1, dfe) else 2 * (1 - pt(thit1, dfe))

# Keputusan
kept0 <- if (pval0 <= alpha) "Tolak H0" else "Gagal Tolak H0"
kept1 <- if (pval1 <= alpha) "Tolak H0" else "Gagal Tolak H0"

# Tabel parsial
tabel_parsial <- data.frame(
  Variabel      = c("Intercept (b0)", "X (b1)"),
  Coefficient   = round(c(b0, b1), 4),
  Std_Error     = round(c(seb0, seb1), 4),
  T_hitung      = round(c(thit0, thit1), 4),
  T_tabel       = round(c(ttab, ttab), 4),
  p_value       = round(c(pval0, pval1), 4),
  Keputusan     = c(kept0, kept1)
)

print(tabel_parsial)
```

Confodence Interfal Parameter
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Margin CI
ci0 <- ttab * seb0  # margin error b0
ci1 <- ttab * seb1  # margin error b1

cat("Confidence Interval (95%) untuk setiap parameter:\n")
cat("β0: (", round(b0 - ci0, 4), ",", round(b0 + ci0, 4), ")\n")
cat("β1: (", round(b1 - ci1, 4), ",", round(b1 + ci1, 4), ")\n")
```

Regresi Linear Berganda
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Contoh data: Experience (X1), Score (X2), Salary (Y)
# Ganti dengan dataset sebenarnya

# Import data (sesuaikan path)
# library(readxl)
# dataset <- read_excel("week2.xlsx")
# x1 <- dataset$Experience
# x2 <- dataset$Score
# y  <- dataset$Salary

# Simulasi data contoh
x1 <- c(1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10)
x2 <- c(80, 75, 70, 65, 60, 85, 78, 72, 68, 55)
y  <- c(30, 35, 40, 45, 50, 32, 38, 43, 48, 55)

# Bentuk matriks Y dan X
Y <- as.matrix(y)
X <- as.matrix(cbind(1, x1, x2))  # kolom 1 untuk intercept

# Dimensi
n <- dim(X)[1]  # jumlah observasi
k <- dim(X)[2]  # jumlah kolom (termasuk intercept)

# Estimasi parameter: b = (X'X)^-1 * X'Y
xtx <- solve(t(X) %*% X)   # invers dari (X'X)
xty <- t(X) %*% Y           # X'Y
b   <- xtx %*% xty           # vektor koefisien

cat("Estimasi Parameter:\n")
rownames(b) <- c("b0 (Intercept)", "b1 (X1)", "b2 (X2)")
print(round(b, 4))

# Nilai prediksi dan residual
ytopi <- X %*% b        # Y_hat = X * b
etopi <- Y - ytopi      # residual

# Hitung SS
ybar <- sum(y) / n     # rata-rata Y manual

ssr <- as.numeric(t(b) %*% xty - n * ybar^2)  # SSR = b'(X'Y) - n*ybar^2
sse <- as.numeric(t(Y) %*% Y - t(b) %*% xty)  # SSE = Y'Y - b'(X'Y)
sst <- ssr + sse

# Degrees of freedom
dfr <- k - 1      # jumlah prediktor
dfe <- n - k      # n dikurangi jumlah parameter
dft <- dfr + dfe

# Mean squares
msr <- ssr / dfr
mse <- sse / dfe

# Uji Serentak
alpha <- 0.05
fhit <- msr / mse
ftab <- qf(1 - alpha, dfr, dfe)
pvalf <- round(2 * (1 - pf(fhit, dfr, dfe)), 4)

kepf <- if (fhit > ftab) "Tolak H0" else "Gagal Tolak H0"

cat("\n=== Tabel ANOVA ===\n")
tbl <- data.frame(
  Source   = c("Regression", "Residual", "Total"),
  df       = c(dfr, dfe, dft),
  SS       = round(c(ssr, sse, sst), 4),
  MS       = round(c(msr, mse, NA), 4),
  F_hitung = round(c(fhit, NA, NA), 4),
  F_tabel  = round(c(ftab, NA, NA), 4),
  p_value  = c(pvalf, NA, NA)
)
print(tbl)
cat("Keputusan:", kepf, "\n")

# Uji Parsial
sb    <- sqrt(mse) * sqrt(diag(xtx))  # standard error tiap koefisien
thit  <- as.vector(b) / sb             # t hitung tiap koefisien
ttab2 <- qt(1 - alpha / 2, dfe)

pval_t <- numeric(k)
kept   <- character(k)
cia    <- numeric(k)
cib    <- numeric(k)

for (i in 1:k) {
  pval_t[i] <- if (thit[i] < 0) 2 * pt(thit[i], dfe) else 2 * (1 - pt(thit[i], dfe))
  kept[i]   <- if (pval_t[i] <= alpha) "Tolak H0" else "Gagal Tolak H0"
  cia[i]    <- as.vector(b)[i] + ttab2 * sb[i]  # batas atas CI
  cib[i]    <- as.vector(b)[i] - ttab2 * sb[i]  # batas bawah CI
}

cat("\n=== Tabel Uji Parsial ===\n")
tbl_parsial <- data.frame(
  Variabel    = c("Intercept", "X1", "X2"),
  Coefficient = round(as.vector(b), 4),
  Std_Error   = round(sb, 4),
  T_hitung    = round(thit, 4),
  T_tabel     = round(rep(ttab2, k), 4),
  p_value     = round(pval_t, 4),
  Keputusan   = kept
)
print(tbl_parsial)

# R-squared
rsq  <- ssr / sst
radj <- rsq - (dfr * (1 - rsq)) / (n - dfr - 1)
cat("\nR-squared         :", round(rsq, 4), "\n")
cat("R-squared Adjusted:", round(radj, 4), "\n")
```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```
